name: Pan Global Resources Inc.
summary: Pan Global Resources Inc., a junior resource company, engages in the base and precious metal exploration. It explores for lead, zinc, silver, gold, and copper. The company manages the Aguilas Project that includes 4 mineral exploration licenses covering 13,563 hectares, as well as additional mineral rights applications covering 2,803 hectares. It also has an option to acquire 100% of the Escacena Investigation Permit in Andalucia, Spain. The company was formerly known as Mosam Capital Corp. and changed its name to Pan Global Resources Inc. in December 2009. Pan Global Resources Inc. was founded in 2006 and is based in Vancouver, Canada.
